REC Campus · 2026
01
About the Project

Seeing the
campus anew

This photography project is a love letter to Rajalakshmi Engineering College — capturing the hidden beauty in everyday spaces. Through careful observation and a curious eye, this collection documents the college's striking architecture, lush pockets of nature, and candid moments of student life.

Each frame is an invitation to pause, look closer, and rediscover the familiar as something extraordinary.

04
The Process

Behind the Frames

👁
Observation

Every great photograph begins with slowing down — walking the campus with fresh eyes, noticing light, shadow, and the moments between moments.

⚙
Composition

Applying rule of thirds, leading lines, and natural framing to transform everyday scenes into intentional visual stories.

✦
Light & Timing

Golden hour, monsoon skies, fluorescent lab glow — each lighting condition shapes the emotion and mood of the final image.

◈
Post Processing

Subtle tonal adjustments to preserve authenticity while elevating visual impact — the final polish that makes a good photo great.

REC Through My Lens

A campus photography portfolio capturing the soul of Rajalakshmi Engineering College through careful observation and artistic vision.
